Package neqsim.process.operations

Class OperationalScenarioResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.operations.OperationalScenarioResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class OperationalScenarioResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result from executing an OperationalScenario.

The result records action-level log messages, errors, warnings, and before/after values for manipulated variables so reports can trace what changed in the process model.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
